tour_overview.text: Watch the route from left to right. Confirm material before preparation, complete every required setup before machining, inspect before shipping, and never advance a job with a missing operation.

tour_planning.text: At planning, open the customer order and read material, dimensions, tolerance, finish, quantity, and due date. Accept the job only when you understand its route and can support the promise.

tour_material.text: At the NOX catalog, select the alloy named on the traveler, compare dimensions and certification, verify the coin cost, and confirm the order. Success creates a delivery record for receiving.

tour_saw.text: At the bandsaw, start with an accepted job and delivered material. Enter the traveler cut length, include finish allowance, keep hands clear, and confirm the blank before it moves forward.

tour_tooling.text: At the tool cart, match the primary cutter to the feature, set only the stickout needed for clearance, then gauge the probe and chamfer tool. The VMC stays locked until all three are ready.

tour_vmc.text: At the VMC, verify the blank, workholding, complete tool kit, work offset, spindle direction, and coolant command. Run the program only after every answer is valid, then review the resulting grade.

tour_shop_class.text: Use Shop Class when a result does not make sense. Review the formula or principle, answer the knowledge check, and return to the station understanding why the corrected process should work.

tour_manual_mill.text: The future manual mill task will require secure workholding, edge finding, spindle selection, controlled feed, measured depth, and a safe stop. For now, use this stop to learn its location and role.

tour_deburr.text: The future deburr task will ask you to identify required edges, choose a safe tool, apply a consistent edge break, protect critical features, and confirm the part is safe to handle before inspection.

tour_lathe.text: Open the lathe inspection view and trace the stock, chuck, turret, tools, tailstock, and control. Production remains locked, but you can already verify clearance and recognize unsafe stickout.

tour_mtconnect.text: The future connectivity task will map machine states, confirm signals, identify downtime, and compare actual cycle behavior with the plan. For now, verify where the node sits on the data lane.

tour_handoff.text: The future handoff task will record job status, completed operations, next action, quality concerns, and unusual conditions. A passing handoff gives the next operator enough context to act safely.

tour_receiving.text: At receiving, compare the purchase record with the physical stock and certification. Quarantine anything with the wrong alloy, size, quantity, damage, or missing paperwork before it reaches a machine.

tour_missions.text: Read the mission board from top to bottom: current chapter, completed tasks, job count, quality gate, and next achievable step. Use Go To and Open whenever you need the game to route you correctly.
